name: Hepatology Labs — Diuretic Intolerance

results.name: CMP — Creatinine
results.interpretation: Risen from ~1.1 baseline after diuretic up-titration — diuretic-induced AKI.

interpretation: Up-titration of furosemide and spironolactone to control the hydrothorax produced hyperkalemia, hyponatremia, and azotemia — demonstrating that this patient does not tolerate higher diuretic doses. This is the rationale for moving to mechanical drainage (paracentesis/thoracentesis) rather than more diuretic.
